title: Add metrics endpoint to track learning system effectiveness and improvement over time
context: Implementing Milestone 1 of agent learning system. Create API endpoint to measure if the learning system is actually improving agent performance. See design doc at docs/agent-learning-system.md section 'Success Metrics'. Need to track: code review acceptance rate before/after learning injection, pattern application count, pattern effectiveness (success rate when applied), learning coverage (% of tasks with learnings injected). This provides observability into whether agents are getting better. DEPENDS ON: All prior learning handoffs.
acceptance: Endpoint GET /api/learning/stats?agent=programmer returns: total outcomes, rejection rate, acceptance rate (overall + with/without learnings), pattern count (total, active, high-confidence), top patterns by application count, effectiveness scores. Endpoint GET /api/learning/patterns?agent=programmer&active=true returns list of active learned patterns. Unit tests verify metric calculations. Can verify in browser that stats show expected data after running some tasks.
